allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output \("PID={0} Name={1} StartTime={2}" -f $p.Id, $p.ProcessName, $p.StartTime\) } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output \("Port={0} PID={1} Name={2} StartTime={3}" -f $c.LocalPort, $p.Id, $p.ProcessName, $p.StartTime\) } })
